name: OVO Classic Owl Hoodie
description: Heavyweight cotton-blend hoodie featuring the iconic OVO owl embroidery on the chest. Brushed inner fleece for premium comfort.

name: OVO Midnight Pullover Hoodie
description: Midnight black pullover with tonal owl logo and ribbed cuffs. Designed for everyday wear.

name: OVO Essential T-Shirt
description: Soft 100% cotton crewneck tee with screen-printed OVO logo. A wardrobe essential.

name: OVO Owl Graphic Tee
description: Bold front graphic tee made from premium ringspun cotton. Relaxed fit.

name: OVO Cropped Tank Top
description: Lightweight cropped tank with subtle owl detail. Perfect for layering or solo wear.

name: OVO Long Sleeve Henley
description: Three-button henley in heavyweight cotton, finished with embroidered logo at hem.

name: OVO Snapback Cap
description: Adjustable snapback with raised owl embroidery. Structured six-panel build.

name: OVO Knit Beanie
description: Cozy ribbed-knit beanie with woven owl tag. Soft acrylic blend keeps you warm.

name: OVO Crossbody Bag
description: Compact crossbody with adjustable strap and dual zip compartments. Water-resistant nylon.

name: OVO Zip-Up Hoodie Grey
description: Full-zip hoodie in heather grey with side pockets and adjustable drawstrings.

name: OVO Striped Polo
description: Classic polo with subtle horizontal stripes and embroidered owl on chest.

name: OVO Logo Socks (3-Pack)
description: Three pairs of crew socks with ribbed cuffs and woven OVO branding.
